description: Offline mapper that reads three source-service JSON files and emits one consolidated ATR export JSON, one bulk-status manifest, and NDJSON by resource type.

steps: Load all source records from the member coverage, provider directory, and claims attribution service files.
Index source records by sourceId and by fhirId to keep upstream identifiers separate from FHIR resource ids.
Construct Organization resources first so downstream references resolve.
Construct provider-side Location resources from provider directory locations only.
Construct Practitioner resources with full provider-shareable demographics and qualification issuer references.
Construct PractitionerRole resources that link Practitioner, Organization, and rotated provider Location references.
Construct Patient resources with ATR and US Core demographic elements, including race, ethnicity, and birth sex extensions.
Construct RelatedPerson resources only for deterministic dependent coverage members.
Construct Coverage resources for every attributed member, preserving Patient versus RelatedPerson subscriber and policyHolder semantics.
Construct one contract-scoped Group resource with changeType, coverageReference, and attributedProvider member extensions.
Write output/atr_bulk_export_single.json, output/bulk_status_response.json, and one NDJSON file per exported resource type.

determinism.roleOrganizationRule: role i uses provider organization-((i-1) mod 3)+1
